briefdescription.para: Attribute to place variable in a specific section.
Counter Register A Lower Byte Mask.
Counter Register A Upper Byte Offset.
Max configurable number of transfers in NORMAL MODE.
< Max number of transfers per repeat for REPEAT MODE

detaileddescription.para: Max number of transfers per repeat for REPEAT MODE

briefdescription.para: < Max number of transfers per block in BLOCK MODE

detaileddescription.para: Max number of transfers per block in BLOCK MODE

briefdescription.para: Max configurable number of blocks to transfer in BLOCK MODE.
Area that repeats during repeat transfer mode.
Area that repeats during repeat transfer mode.
Configure the p_info state and write p_info to DTC vector table.
Enable transfer in ICU on this activation source.
Disable transfer in ICU on this activation source.
Start transfers on this activation source.

parameterdescription.para: if this activation source in dtc vector table is not configured.

briefdescription.para: Stop transfers on this activation source.

parameterdescription.para: if this activation source in dtc vector table is not configured.

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct device *dev, uint8_t activation_irq, void const *p_src, void *p_dest, uint16_t const num_transfers)
memberdef.name: dtc_renesas_rx_reset_transfer

briefdescription.para: Reset transfer on this activation source.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the source address for the transfer.
Pointer to the destination address for the transfer.
Number of data units to transfer.

briefdescription.para: Get status transfer of DTC module and store it into status pointer.

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct device *dev, uint8_t activation_irq, transfer_properties_t *const p_properties)
memberdef.name: dtc_renesas_rx_info_get

briefdescription.para: Get information about this transfer and store it into p_properties.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to structure to receive driver-specific transfer properties.

briefdescription.para: Renesas RX DTC Driver Header File.
